positive: Minimalist abstract line art representing 'calm.' A single, continuous flowing line forming simple geometric shapes (circles, arcs) on a cream background. Clean, elegant, negative space utilization, single color palette (slate blue and cream), perfect balance, Zen aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, excessive detail, clutter, photorealistic texture, harsh lines
